message:
POLYPAL CHROME EXTENSION — MVP BUILD SPEC

PolyPal is a Chrome extension that explains Polymarket prediction markets in plain English.

MVP SCOPE:
1. Chrome extension using Manifest v3
2. Detect when user is on polymarket.com viewing a market page
3. Show a floating PolyPal button on Polymarket pages
4. When clicked, read market data from the page (question, YES/NO prices, volume, resolution date) and generate a plain-English ELI5 explanation
5. ELI5 explains: what the market asks, what odds mean in plain language, potential return if you buy YES or NO, how much money is in the market, when it resolves
6. Gate the free tool behind email signup (store in localStorage for MVP, connect to Beehiiv later)
7. Popup UI with text input to paste any Polymarket URL for explanation

TECH:
- Polymarket Gamma API (https://gamma-api.polymarket.com) for market data
- Template-based ELI5 generation (no LLM needed for MVP)
- Manifest v3, chrome.storage.local
- Dark UI matching Polymarket aesthetic

DELIVERABLE: Working extension folder for chrome://extensions developer mode. Push to GitHub unblinkr/polypal.
